title: No-objection received for promoter group reclassification of Shreyas Shibulal and Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal
detailed_summary: BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited granted no-objection letters dated May 11, 2026 for Infosys’s application to reclassify Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal from the “Promoter and Promoter Group” category to “Public” under Regulation 31A of SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.

key_facts.fact: BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited granted no-objection to Infosys’s application for reclassification of Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal.

The reclassification is from the category of “Promoter and Promoter Group” of the Company to “Public” in terms of Regulation 31A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

corporate_actions.description: No-objection was granted for reclassification of Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal from “Promoter and Promoter Group” to “Public”.
